reviews.review_description:
I got this almost a year ago thinking the graphics would look like the photos in the above advertisement.  NOT EVEN CLOSE!  

I hope they fix the graphics, physics, and mechanics and make a good animal hunting game.  Oculus needs a good animal hunting/shooter game badly.

reviews.review_title: This has got to be the worst game
reviews.review_description: I thought this would be a free roam hunting game, well I guess not because apparently there’s very crappy levels that are SO BORING! The game in general is so BAD! Don’t waste your money.
